dc:title: Journal of Sports Science and Medicine - Random Sample Corpus (2014-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: sports science
sports medicine
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A random sample of 1,000 open-access articles published in the Journal of Sports Science and Medicine (2014-2026), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. CrossRef's index for this journal is sparse before ~2021, so articles were discovered by crawling the journal's own site directory structure; 434 papers have a verified CrossRef DOI and title, the remaining 566 have title/author metadata from GROBID's own PDF extraction only (see manifest.csv title_source column).
dc:source: Journal of Sports Science and Medicine, ISSN 1303-2968, https://jssm.org/
dc:rights: CC-BY 4.0 or CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0, depending on the article

dc:provenance.pdf_source: Direct crawl of jssm.org/volume{N}/iss{1-4}/cap/ directory listings (volumes 13-25)
dc:provenance.doi_reconstruction: DOI guessed from volume->year mapping and PDF start page, verified against CrossRef where possible (434/1000 confirmed)
dc:provenance.title_source: CrossRef where DOI confirmed (434 papers); GROBID PDF header extraction otherwise (566 papers)
dc:provenance.sampling: Random sample of 1000 from ~1132 discovered candidates, seed 20260620
